title: stellaria cerastoides var. multicaulis
intro: Stellaria cerastoides var. multicaulis, also known as the starwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of Stellaria cerastoides var. multicaulis is typically made into a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
